# Aging case study

## Setup & Data

```{r}
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(HDAnalyzeR)
library(limma)
library(tibble)
library(patchwork)
library(stringr)
library(vegan)
library(ggrepel)
library(viridis)
library(glmnet)
library(ggbeeswarm)

select <- dplyr::select
rename <- dplyr::rename
```

```{r}
# Olink -----
olink <- read_tsv("data/data_phase2_HT_bridged_curated_subset_20251031.tsv") |>
    select("DAid", "Assay", "UniProt", "Batch", "NPX", "LOD")

# Soma -----
soma_wide <- read_tsv("data/data_phase2_somalogic_curated_subset_20251031.tsv")
soma_meta <- read_tsv("data/meta_phase2_somalogic_elod_20251028.tsv")

soma <- soma_wide |>
  pivot_longer(cols = -c("DAid"), names_to = "AptName", values_to = "Value") |>
  left_join(soma_meta |> filter(Organism == "Human") |> select(AptName,eLOD, EntrezGeneSymbol), by = "AptName") |>
  rename(Assay = EntrezGeneSymbol)

# Sample metadata ----
sample_meta <- read_excel("data/samples_2025-10-10.xlsx") |>
  mutate(
    Disease = ifelse(Cohort == "PARD", Diagnose, Disease),
    Disease = ifelse(Disease %in% c("Healthy control", "healthy", "Control"), "Healthy", Disease),
    Disease = case_when(Disease == "Pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma" ~ "Pancreatic cancer",
                        Diagnose == "OVC" ~  "Ovarian cancer",
                        Diagnose == "BRC" ~ "Breast cancer",
                        Diagnose == "LUNG" ~ "Lung cancer",
                        Diagnose == "CRC" ~ "Colorectal cancer",
                        Diagnose == "PRC" ~ "Prostate cancer",
                        Diagnose == "4_random" ~ "BAMSE - visit 4",
                        Diagnose == "8_random" ~ "BAMSE - visit 8",
                        Diagnose == "16_random" ~ "BAMSE - visit 16",
                        Diagnose == "24_random" ~ "BAMSE - visit 24",
                        Diagnose == "pregnancy" ~ "Pregnancy",
                        Diagnose == "PD" ~ "Parkinson's disease",
                        T ~ Disease),
    Class = case_when(Disease %in% c("Breast cancer", "Colorectal cancer", "Lung cancer", "Ovarian cancer", "Prostate cancer") ~ "Cancer",
                      Disease == "Parkinson's disease" ~ "Neurologic",
                      Cohort == "BAMS" ~ "Healthy",
                      Cohort == "PREG" ~ "Healthy",
                      Disease == "Healthy" ~ "Healthy",
                      T ~ Class)
    ) |>
  select(DAid, Cohort, Class, Disease, Age, Sex, BMI)

hpa_classification <- read_tsv("data/proteinatlas.tsv")
age_model_split <- readRDS("data/current_split.rds")
train <- age_model_split$data_train
test <- age_model_split$data_test
correct_vasculitis_age <- readRDS("data/AAV_DAid_Age.rds")

train <- train |>
  left_join(correct_vasculitis_age |> select(DAid, Age.at.sampling), by = "DAid") |>
  mutate(Age = dplyr::coalesce(Age.at.sampling, Age)) |>
  select(-Age.at.sampling)

test <- test |>
  left_join(correct_vasculitis_age |> select(DAid, Age.at.sampling), by = "DAid") |>
  mutate(Age = dplyr::coalesce(Age.at.sampling, Age)) |>
  select(-Age.at.sampling)

soma_map <- soma |> distinct(AptName, Assay)
```

## DE

Sets

```{r}
data_all <- rbind(train, test)
sample_meta_filt <- sample_meta |> 
  filter(DAid %in% data_all$DAid)

healthy_ids <- sample_meta_filt |>
  filter(Disease %in% c("Healthy", "Longevity")) |>
  pull(DAid) |>
  unique()

healthy_young_dat <- data_all |> 
  filter(DAid %in% healthy_ids, Age <= 70)

healthy_old_dat <- data_all |> 
  filter(DAid %in% healthy_ids, Age > 70)

disease_ids <- sample_meta_filt |>
  filter(!Disease %in% c("Healthy", "Longevity")) |>
  pull(DAid) |>
  unique()

disease_old_dat <- data_all |> 
  filter(DAid %in% disease_ids, Age > 70)
```

### Young vs Old Healthy

Olink

```{r}
obj <- hd_initialize(
  olink |> 
    filter(DAid %in% c(healthy_young_dat$DAid, healthy_old_dat$DAid)),
  sample_meta |>
    filter(DAid %in% healthy_ids) |>
    select(-Age) |>
    left_join(data_all |> select(DAid, Age), by = "DAid") |>
    mutate(class = if_else(Age > 70, "old", "young"))
  )

de_olink <- hd_de_limma(obj, variable = "class", case = "old", correct = c("Sex", "Age")) |> 
  hd_plot_volcano()
```

SomaScan

```{r}
obj <- hd_initialize(
  soma |> 
    filter(DAid %in% c(healthy_young_dat$DAid, healthy_old_dat$DAid)),
  sample_meta |>
    filter(DAid %in% healthy_ids) |>
    select(-Age) |>
    left_join(data_all |> select(DAid, Age), by = "DAid") |>
    mutate(class = if_else(Age > 70, "old", "young")),
  var_name = "AptName",
  value_name = "Value"
  )

de_soma <- hd_de_limma(obj, variable = "class", case = "old", correct = c("Sex", "Age")) 

de_soma$de_res <- de_soma$de_res |> 
  left_join(soma_map, by = c("Feature" = "AptName")) |>
  filter(!is.na(Assay)) |>
  group_by(Assay) |>
  slice_min(order_by = adj.P.Val, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(-Feature) |>
  rename(Feature = Assay)

de_soma <- de_soma |> 
  hd_plot_volcano()
```

Combine results

```{r}
olink_p <- de_olink$de_res |>
  select(Feature, adj.P.Val) |>
  rename(adj.P.Val_olink = adj.P.Val)

soma_p <- de_soma$de_res |>
  select(Feature, adj.P.Val) |>
  rename(adj.P.Val_soma = adj.P.Val)

merged_p <- full_join(olink_p, soma_p, by = "Feature") |>
  mutate(
    adj.P.Val_olink = replace_na(adj.P.Val_olink, 1),
    adj.P.Val_soma  = replace_na(adj.P.Val_soma, 1)
  )

merged_p <- merged_p |>
  mutate(
    x = -log10(adj.P.Val_soma),
    y = -log10(adj.P.Val_olink),
    sig_olink = adj.P.Val_olink < 0.05,
    sig_soma  = adj.P.Val_soma  < 0.05,
    sig_cat = case_when(
      sig_olink & sig_soma ~ "Significant in both",
      sig_olink & !sig_soma ~ "Significant in Olink",
      !sig_olink & sig_soma ~ "Significant in SomaScan",
      TRUE ~ "Not significant in both"
    ),
    sig_cat = factor(sig_cat, levels = c(
      "Significant in Olink",
      "Significant in SomaScan",
      "Significant in both",
      "Not significant in both"
    ))
  )

cols <- c(
  "Significant in Olink" = "#6FC2EE",
  "Significant in SomaScan" = "#D82F88",
  "Significant in both" = "#312F7C",
  "Not significant in both" = "#E5E5E5"
)

top10 <- merged_p |>
  mutate(min_p = pmin(adj.P.Val_olink, adj.P.Val_soma, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  slice_min(order_by = min_p, n = 10)

ggplot(merged_p, aes(x = x, y = y, color = sig_cat)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.8) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = top10,
    aes(label = Feature),
    size = 3.2,
    max.overlaps = 20
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
  labs(x = "-log10(pval_soma)", y = "-log10(pval_olink)", color = "Significance") +
  theme_hd() + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = 0.5), legend.position = "none")

ggsave("results/olink_soma_healthy_old_vs_healthy_young.pdf", width = 6, height = 6)
```

### Old Healthy vs Old Disease

Olink

```{r}
obj <- hd_initialize(
  olink |> 
    filter(DAid %in% c(disease_old_dat$DAid, healthy_old_dat$DAid)),
  sample_meta |>
    filter(DAid %in% c(disease_old_dat$DAid, healthy_old_dat$DAid)) |>
    select(-Age) |>
    left_join(data_all |> select(DAid, Age), by = "DAid") |>
    mutate(class = if_else(Disease %in% c("Healthy", "Longevity"), "Healthy", "Disease"))
  )

de_olink_disease <- hd_de_limma(obj, variable = "class", case = "Healthy", correct = c("Sex", "Age")) |> 
  hd_plot_volcano()
```

SomaScan

```{r}
obj <- hd_initialize(
  soma |> 
    filter(DAid %in% c(disease_old_dat$DAid, healthy_old_dat$DAid)),
  sample_meta |>
    filter(DAid %in% c(disease_old_dat$DAid, healthy_old_dat$DAid)) |>
    select(-Age) |>
    left_join(data_all |> select(DAid, Age), by = "DAid") |>
    mutate(class = if_else(Disease %in% c("Healthy", "Longevity"), "Healthy", "Disease")),
  var_name = "AptName",
  value_name = "Value"
  )

de_soma_disease <- hd_de_limma(obj, variable = "class", case = "Healthy", correct = c("Sex", "Age")) 

de_soma_disease$de_res <- de_soma_disease$de_res |> 
  left_join(soma_map, by = c("Feature" = "AptName")) |>
  filter(!is.na(Assay)) |>
  group_by(Assay) |>
  slice_min(order_by = adj.P.Val, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  ungroup() |>
  select(-Feature) |>
  rename(Feature = Assay)

de_soma_disease <- de_soma_disease |> 
  hd_plot_volcano()
```

Combine results

```{r}
olink_p <- de_olink_disease$de_res |>
  select(Feature, adj.P.Val) |>
  rename(adj.P.Val_olink = adj.P.Val)

soma_p <- de_soma_disease$de_res |>
  select(Feature, adj.P.Val) |>
  rename(adj.P.Val_soma = adj.P.Val)

merged_p <- full_join(olink_p, soma_p, by = "Feature") |>
  mutate(
    adj.P.Val_olink = replace_na(adj.P.Val_olink, 1),
    adj.P.Val_soma  = replace_na(adj.P.Val_soma, 1)
  )

merged_p <- merged_p |>
  mutate(
    x = -log10(adj.P.Val_soma),
    y = -log10(adj.P.Val_olink),
    sig_olink = adj.P.Val_olink < 0.05,
    sig_soma  = adj.P.Val_soma  < 0.05,
    sig_cat = case_when(
      sig_olink & sig_soma ~ "Significant in both",
      sig_olink & !sig_soma ~ "Significant in Olink",
      !sig_olink & sig_soma ~ "Significant in SomaScan",
      TRUE ~ "Not significant in both"
    ),
    sig_cat = factor(sig_cat, levels = c(
      "Significant in Olink",
      "Significant in SomaScan",
      "Significant in both",
      "Not significant in both"
    ))
  )

cols <- c(
  "Significant in Olink" = "#6FC2EE",
  "Significant in SomaScan" = "#D82F88",
  "Significant in both" = "#312F7C",
  "Not significant in both" = "#E5E5E5"
)

top10 <- merged_p |>
  mutate(min_p = pmin(adj.P.Val_olink, adj.P.Val_soma, na.rm = TRUE)) |>
  slice_min(order_by = min_p, n = 10)

ggplot(merged_p, aes(x = x, y = y, color = sig_cat)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 1.8) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = top10,
    aes(label = Feature),
    size = 3.2,
    max.overlaps = 20
  ) +
  scale_color_manual(values = cols) +
  labs(x = "-log10(pval_soma)", y = "-log10(pval_olink)", color = "Significance") +
  theme_hd() + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = 0.5), legend.position = "none")

ggsave("results/olink_soma_healthy_vs_diseased_old.pdf", width = 6, height = 6)
```


### Healthy aging vs Diseased aging comparison

```{r}
# Olink: logFC comparison
olink_logfc <- de_olink$de_res |>
  select(Feature, logFC, adj.P.Val) |>
  rename(logFC_olink = logFC, adj.P.Val_olink = adj.P.Val) |>
  inner_join(
    de_olink_disease$de_res |>
      select(Feature, logFC, adj.P.Val) |>
      rename(logFC_olink_disease = logFC, adj.P.Val_olink_disease = adj.P.Val),
    by = "Feature"
  ) |>
  filter(adj.P.Val_olink < 0.05 | adj.P.Val_olink_disease < 0.05) |>
  mutate(
    max_abs_logFC = pmax(abs(logFC_olink), abs(logFC_olink_disease), na.rm = TRUE),
    highlight = ifelse(abs(logFC_olink) > 0.5 | abs(logFC_olink_disease) > 0.5, "highlight", "other")
  )

top10_olink <- olink_logfc |>
  slice_max(order_by = max_abs_logFC, n = 10)

p_olink <- ggplot(olink_logfc, aes(x = logFC_olink, y = logFC_olink_disease, color = highlight)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 2) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = top10_olink,
    aes(x = logFC_olink, y = logFC_olink_disease, label = Feature),
    size = 3.2,
    max.overlaps = 20,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("highlight" = "#6FC2EE", "other" = "#E5E5E5")) +
  labs(
    x = "logFC (Old Healthy VS Young Healthy, Olink)",
    y = "logFC (Old Healthy vs Old Disease, Olink)",
    title = "Olink: logFC comparison"
  ) +
  theme_hd() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# SomaScan: logFC comparison
soma_logfc <- de_soma$de_res |>
  select(Feature, logFC, adj.P.Val) |>
  rename(logFC_soma = logFC, adj.P.Val_soma = adj.P.Val) |>
  inner_join(
    de_soma_disease$de_res |>
      select(Feature, logFC, adj.P.Val) |>
      rename(logFC_soma_disease = logFC, adj.P.Val_soma_disease = adj.P.Val),
    by = "Feature"
  ) |>
  filter(adj.P.Val_soma < 0.05 | adj.P.Val_soma_disease < 0.05) |>
  mutate(
    max_abs_logFC = pmax(abs(logFC_soma), abs(logFC_soma_disease), na.rm = TRUE),
    highlight = ifelse(abs(logFC_soma) > 0.5 | abs(logFC_soma_disease) > 0.5, "highlight", "other")
  )

top10_soma <- soma_logfc |>
  slice_max(order_by = max_abs_logFC, n = 10)

p_soma <- ggplot(soma_logfc, aes(x = logFC_soma, y = logFC_soma_disease, color = highlight)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.8, size = 2) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = top10_soma,
    aes(x = logFC_soma, y = logFC_soma_disease, label = Feature),
    size = 3.2,
    max.overlaps = 20,
    inherit.aes = FALSE
  ) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "black", linewidth = 0.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("highlight" = "#D82F88", "other" = "#E5E5E5")) +
  labs(
    x = "logFC (Old Healthy VS Young Healthy, SomaScan)",
    y = "logFC (Old Healthy vs Old Disease, SomaScan)",
    title = "SomaScan: logFC comparison"
  ) +
  theme_hd() +
  theme(legend.position = "none")

# Side by side
p_olink + p_soma

ggsave("results/olink_soma_healthy_vs_diseased_aging.pdf", p_olink + p_soma, width = 10, height = 6)
```

### GSEA enrichment of results

```{r}
enrichment_go <- hd_gsea(de_olink, database = "GO", ontology = "ALL", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "logFC")
enrichment_kegg <- hd_gsea(de_olink, database = "KEGG", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "logFC")
enrichment_reactome <- hd_gsea(de_olink, database = "Reactome", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "logFC")

go_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_go$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "GO")
kegg_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_kegg$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "KEGG")
reactome_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_reactome$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "Reactome")

combined_olink <- bind_rows(go_tbl, kegg_tbl, reactome_tbl) |> filter(p.adjust < 0.05)

top_terms_olink <- combined_olink |>
  group_by(Database) |>
  arrange(p.adjust, .by_group = TRUE) |>
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
rm(enrichment_go)
rm(enrichment_kegg)
rm(enrichment_reactome)
enrichment_go <- hd_gsea(de_soma, database = "GO", ontology = "ALL", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "logFC")
enrichment_kegg <- hd_gsea(de_soma, database = "KEGG", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "logFC")
enrichment_reactome <- hd_gsea(de_soma, database = "Reactome", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "logFC")

go_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_go$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "GO")
kegg_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_kegg$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "KEGG")
reactome_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_reactome$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "Reactome")

combined_soma <- bind_rows(go_tbl, kegg_tbl, reactome_tbl) |> filter(p.adjust < 0.05)

top_terms_soma <- combined_soma |>
  group_by(Database) |>
  arrange(p.adjust, .by_group = TRUE) |>
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
rm(enrichment_go)
rm(enrichment_kegg)
rm(enrichment_reactome)
enrichment_go <- hd_gsea(de_olink_disease, database = "GO", ontology = "ALL", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "logFC")
enrichment_reactome <- hd_gsea(de_olink_disease, database = "Reactome", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "logFC")

go_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_go$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "GO")
reactome_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_reactome$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "Reactome")

combined_olink_disease <- bind_rows(go_tbl, reactome_tbl) |> filter(p.adjust < 0.05)

top_terms_olink_disease <- combined_olink_disease |>
  group_by(Database) |>
  arrange(p.adjust, .by_group = TRUE) |>
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
rm(enrichment_go)
rm(enrichment_kegg)
rm(enrichment_reactome)
enrichment_go <- hd_gsea(de_soma_disease, database = "GO", ontology = "ALL", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "logFC")
enrichment_kegg <- hd_gsea(de_soma_disease, database = "KEGG", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "logFC")
enrichment_reactome <- hd_gsea(de_soma_disease, database = "Reactome", pval_lim = 0.05, ranked_by = "logFC")

go_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_go$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "GO")
kegg_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_kegg$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "KEGG")
reactome_tbl <- as.data.frame(enrichment_reactome$enrichment@result) |>
  mutate(Database = "Reactome")

combined_soma_disease <- bind_rows(go_tbl, kegg_tbl, reactome_tbl) |> filter(p.adjust < 0.05)

top_terms_soma_disease <- combined_soma_disease |>
  group_by(Database) |>
  arrange(p.adjust, .by_group = TRUE) |>
  ungroup()
```

```{r}
top_terms <- bind_rows(
  top_terms_olink |> mutate(Platform = "Olink"),
  top_terms_soma |> mutate(Platform = "SomaScan")
) |> arrange(p.adjust, .by_group = TRUE)

top_terms_disease <- bind_rows(
  top_terms_olink_disease |> mutate(Platform = "Olink"),
  top_terms_soma_disease |> mutate(Platform = "SomaScan")
) |> arrange(p.adjust, .by_group = TRUE)


write_csv(top_terms, "data/aging_terms.csv")
write_csv(top_terms_disease, "data/aging_terms_disease.csv")
```

Enrichment plot

```{r}
terms_healthy <- read_csv("data/aging_terms.csv") |> 
  mutate(Platform = str_replace(Platform, "Olink Explore|Olink HT", "Olink"))

terms_disease <- read_csv("data/aging_terms_disease.csv") |> 
  mutate(Platform = str_replace(Platform, "Olink Explore|Olink HT", "Olink"))

combined_aging <- full_join(
  terms_healthy |> select(Platform, Description, NES_Healthy = NES, p_Healthy = p.adjust),
  terms_disease |> select(Platform, Description, NES_Disease = NES, p_Disease = p.adjust),
  by = c("Platform", "Description")
) |>
  mutate(
    NES_Healthy = if_else(is.na(NES_Healthy), 0, NES_Healthy),
    NES_Disease = if_else(is.na(NES_Disease), 0, NES_Disease),
    p_Healthy = if_else(is.na(p_Healthy), 1, p_Healthy),
    p_Disease = if_else(is.na(p_Disease), 1, p_Disease),
    min_p = pmin(p_Healthy, p_Disease, na.rm = TRUE),
    sig_size = -log10(min_p),
    sig_size = if_else(is.infinite(sig_size), 20, sig_size),
    sig_size = if_else(is.na(sig_size) | sig_size < 0.1, 0.5, sig_size)
  ) |>
  filter(NES_Healthy >= 0, NES_Disease >= 0)

target_pathways <- c(
  "positive regulation of telomere maintenance via telomerase",
  "RHO GTPase cycle",
  "mitotic cell cycle",
  "APC/C:Cdc20 mediated degradation of Securin",
  "Platelet activation",
  "structural constituent of muscle"
)

top_labels <- combined_aging |>
  filter(Description %in% target_pathways)

pal_platform <- c("Olink" = "#6FC2EE", "SomaScan" = "#D82F88")

combined_plot <- ggplot(combined_aging, aes(x = NES_Healthy, y = NES_Disease, color = Platform)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.8) +
  geom_point(aes(size = sig_size), alpha = 0.7) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0, 2), ylim = c(0, 2)) +
  geom_text_repel(
    data = top_labels,
    aes(label = scales::label_wrap(35)(Description)),
    size = 4,
    fontface = "bold",
    color = "grey10", 
    box.padding = 0.8,
    point.padding = 0.5,
    max.overlaps = Inf,
    min.segment.length = 0,
    show.legend = FALSE
  ) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = pal_platform) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(2, 8), name = expression(Max~-log[10](p.adjust))) +
  labs(
    x = "NES (Healthy Old vs. Healthy Young)",
    y = "NES (Healthy Old vs. Diseased Old)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12, face = "bold"),
    plot.title = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 11, hjust = 0.5, color = "grey30"),
    legend.position = "bottom",
    legend.box = "horizontal"
  )

print(combined_plot)
ggsave("results/quadrant_aging_vs_disease_specific.png", combined_plot, width = 25, height = 20, units = "cm")
```

## Clock

```{r}
healthy_train <- data_all |>
  filter(DAid %in% healthy_ids)

feature_cols <- data_all |>
  select(-any_of(c("DAid", "Age"))) |>
  select(where(is.numeric)) |>
  names()

keep_features <- feature_cols[
  vapply(feature_cols, function(col) {
    x <- healthy_train[[col]]
    any(!is.na(x)) && stats::var(x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0
  }, logical(1))
]

train_medians <- vapply(keep_features, function(col) {
  stats::median(healthy_train[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
}, numeric(1))

impute_with_train_median <- function(df, features, medians) {
  out <- df
  for (col in features) {
    miss <- is.na(out[[col]])
    if (any(miss)) {
      out[[col]][miss] <- medians[[col]]
    }
  }
  out
}

healthy_train_imp <- impute_with_train_median(healthy_train, keep_features, train_medians)

x_train <- as.matrix(healthy_train_imp[, keep_features, drop = FALSE])
y_train <- healthy_train_imp$Age

cv_lasso <- glmnet::cv.glmnet(
  x = x_train,
  y = y_train,
  alpha = 1,
  family = "gaussian",
  nfolds = 5,
  standardize = TRUE
)

disease_levels <- sample_meta_filt |>
  filter(!Disease %in% c("Healthy", "Longevity"), !is.na(Disease)) |>
  distinct(Disease) |>
  pull(Disease)

disease_pred_list <- lapply(disease_levels, function(dz) {
  ids_dz <- sample_meta_filt |>
    filter(Disease == dz) |>
    pull(DAid) |>
    unique()

  dat_dz <- data_all |>
    filter(DAid %in% ids_dz) |>
    select(any_of(c("DAid", "Age")), all_of(keep_features))

  dat_dz_imp <- impute_with_train_median(dat_dz, keep_features, train_medians)

  pred_dz <- as.numeric(
    predict(
      cv_lasso,
      newx = as.matrix(dat_dz_imp[, keep_features, drop = FALSE]),
      s = "lambda.1se"
    )
  )

  tibble(
    DAid = dat_dz_imp$DAid,
    Disease = dz,
    Age = dat_dz_imp$Age,
    pred_age = pred_dz,
    offset = (pred_age - Age)
  )
})

disease_preds <- bind_rows(disease_pred_list)

disease_burden <- disease_preds |>
  summarize(
    n = dplyr::n(),
    mean_offset = mean(offset, na.rm = TRUE),
    median_offset = median(offset, na.rm = TRUE),
    pct_older = mean(offset > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
    rsq = cor(pred_age, Age, use = "complete.obs")^2,
    .by = Disease
  ) |>
  mutate(
    burden_class = case_when(
      median_offset > 2 ~ "Looks older",
      median_offset < -2 ~ "Looks younger",
      TRUE ~ "Same age"
    )
  ) |>
  arrange(desc(median_offset))

# Assign disease class for each disease
disease_class_palette <- c(
  "Healthy" = "#C9B28F",
  "Cardiovascular" = "#ED936B",
  "Metabolic" = "#E0C59A",
  "Cancer" = "#919FC7",
  "Neurologic" = "#7DC0A6",
  "Infection" = "#F9DA56",
  "Autoimmune" = "#DA8EC0"
)

disease_class_map <- sample_meta_filt |>
  filter(!is.na(Disease), !is.na(Class)) |>
  distinct(Disease, Class)

disease_preds_plot <- disease_preds |>
  left_join(disease_class_map, by = "Disease") |>
  mutate(Disease = factor(Disease, levels = rev(disease_burden$Disease)))

p_burden <- ggplot(disease_preds_plot, aes(x = Disease, y = offset)) +
  geom_boxplot(aes(fill = Class), outlier.shape = NA, width = 0.6) +
  geom_jitter(color = "black", alpha = 0.4, size = 1, width = 0.12) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", linewidth = 0.5) +
  coord_flip() +
  scale_fill_manual(values = disease_class_palette, drop = FALSE) +
  labs(
    x = "Disease",
    y = "Offset (Predicted age - Chronological age) / Chronological Age",
    fill = "Disease class"
  ) +
  theme_hd() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(hjust = 0.5))

ggsave("results/disease_burden_swarm_nonagecorrected.pdf", plot = p_burden, width = 8, height = 8)
p_burden
```
